creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problem with syslog-ng is that there is no support for libressl. This has been confirmed by scanning through their git repo.

I could create a freebsd-only patch but I prefer to involve our upstream. Our upstream, an employee of oneidentity.com, is the true maintainer of this port, sending me tarballs which I commit for him. I'll reach out to him first before cobbling a patch. Otherwise he, the true maintainer of this port, will remove the patch next upgrade.
